title: Chinese Buddhist: Wumen Guan (Gateless Gate) (2)
description: From the Chinese Buddhist canon: Wumen Guan (Gateless Gate)
introduction: From the Chinese Buddhist canon: Wumen Guan (Gateless Gate)

translation.text: From Wumen Guan (Gateless Gate): A core text of Chinese Buddhism, transmitted through the great translation period and forming the basis of East Asian Buddhist practice.
